content.en:
"Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord's attack power!!!! how is this possible!"

The wisdom of the reincarnation ancestor tree is not low, and it also knows the reincarnation celestial clan and the reincarnation ancestor.

For countless years, these two clans have entered the reincarnation fruit realm again and again, snatching its reincarnation supreme fruit, although they have succeeded every time, they have also paid a lot of price, and there are many Origin Upper Realm overlords who have died in its hands.

Moreover, its life-saving ability is very strong, and without the strength of the Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, don't even think about hurting it.

However, Ye Tian could shatter the drill bit formed by its countless branches with a single blow, which must have been the attack power of the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Seven Awakenings.

According to the rules of the Reincarnation Fruit Realm, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened five times is allowed to enter here, and he doesn't even want to impact the Six Awakening Realm here, the difficulty is too great, more than 10,000 times that of the outside world.

Otherwise, the Samsara Fruit Realm would not have a powerful reincarnation tree.

And the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree could see that Ye Tian's cultivation was not high, but he had such a terrifying attack, it was simply abnormal.

At this time.

Ye Tian ignored the obstruction of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, this Reincarnation Ancestral Tree only had a high torso defense, but the attack method was single, and there was no threat.

He could kill the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, but there was no need for that.

Once the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree is killed, he will also have to be in trouble, and there is no way to explain it.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian showed all his cultivation strength, and those branches were like paper paste.

Wow!

He grabbed another Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation and put it away.

In a short period of time, all the supreme fruits of reincarnation fell into his hands, and the countless branches of the reincarnation ancestral tree were shattered, and the entire reincarnation ancestral tree was a little bald.

Outside taking away the supreme fruit of reincarnation, Ye Tian urged the spear of the ruin sky and vaguely aimed at the reincarnation ancestral tree.

Then.

The Reincarnation Ancestral Tree felt the threat of death and was a little frightened.

It was the first time he had felt threatened with death.

"Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, is there anything good in the Reincarnation Fruit World besides the Reincarnation Supreme Fruit?"

Ye Tian is threatening the reincarnation ancestral tree, and he wants to get some more benefits.

If it was a threat from other Origin Upper Realm Overlords, the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree would not compromise, but now that it was cowardly, because it sensed the threat of death, Ye Tian was really able to kill it.

Airplanes!

After it passed a message to Ye Tian, it chose to flee.

Ye Tian received this information, so he didn't go after the reincarnation ancestral tree.

"There's really something good!"

Ye Tian smiled, this is an unexpected gain!

Just now, the reincarnation ancestral tree sent him a message, recording a treasure in the reincarnation fruit world, and according to the information, the value of that treasure may still be above the supreme fruit of reincarnation.

......

In the depths of the Reincarnation Fruit Realm, a treasure land composed of countless thunderbolts.

Ye Tian came here.

"Reincarnation Thunder Valley!"

Before he came to the Reincarnation Fruit Realm, he was told about this place, which was the only forbidden place in the Reincarnation Fruit Realm, and no reincarnation celestial clan was allowed to enter here.

It's just that it's too dangerous here, even if it's a Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened five times, he will be instantly smashed into ashes.

Therefore, so far, no Origin Upper Realm Overlord has entered the Reincarnation Thunder Valley, so naturally he does not know the situation of the Reincarnation Thunder Valley.

However, the ancestral tree of reincarnation has been here.

Just now, the message transmitted by the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree is a reincarnation tree inside the Reincarnation Thunder Valley.

It was a thunder tree, but it contained terrifying energy, and even the reincarnation ancestor tree did not dare to approach that thunder tree.

The Thunder Tree bears a silver-white fruit, which looks very extraordinary and has existed for countless years.

In the eyes of the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree, that silver-white fruit was definitely a good thing, a real treasure.

"Try the power of this reincarnation thunder valley!"

Ye Tian stretched out his arm, and used his strength with all his strength to perform a supreme technique on the other side to try to resist the power of the thunder.

Rumble!!!!!

Countless thunderbolts bombarded him with special power, making his arm tingle, but he still withstood it.

"It's such a terrifying thunder, even I'm a little numb, and the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Six Awakenings will definitely not be able to bear it. Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he directly entered the Reincarnation Thunder Valley, looking for the Thunder Tree at an extremely fast speed.

Time passed slowly, and it didn't take long for him to find the little thunder tree.

This small thunder tree grows in a crack, and the terrifying aura permeates it, and it is still easy to find.

Now.

Ye Tian's gaze focused on the silver-white fruit on the thunder tree.

"It's a good thing, although I don't know it!"

Ye Tian flew towards this thunder tree.

But just as he was approaching it, a silver-white thunderbolt came through the void, and the target was directly aimed at Ye Tian.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian struck this thunderbolt with a blow from the Reincarnation Treasure, which scattered it.

However, he also had to admit that this attack definitely reached the full force of the Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

"No wonder the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree doesn't dare to approach it, this guy's strength has reached the Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, and it is the most powerful Reincarnation Tree in the Reincarnation Fruit Realm. "

But this thunder tree should not have a high level of wisdom, and it only likes to stay in the reincarnation thunder valley and never goes out.

Because of this, the outside world is not aware of its existence.

If it weren't for the reincarnation ancestor tree to tell him, he wouldn't know about the existence of the thunder tree.

Of course, if it takes a long time, he may also come here to have a look, and then he will also find the Thunder Tree.

"Take this silver-white fruit first!"

Ye Tian went all out, and even used the supreme power of reincarnation of the Spear of the Ruined Heaven, and killed this thunder tree.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian fought with him.

Then.

The Thunder Tree also moved in earnest, conjuring up a Thunder Giant Tree, unleashing attacks again and again, fighting with Ye Tian.

However.

Ye Tian's strength is too strong.

"Broken!"

The Spear of the Ruin Heaven directly pierced the Thunder Giant Tree's Thunder Giant Tree Phantom, directly penetrating its body, and the other party couldn't stop it at all.

After being hit hard this time, the Thunder Tree withered directly.

And Ye Tian easily snatched the silver-white fruit, and after the silver-white fruit was captured, the thunder tree seemed to be dead, and its vitality slowly dissipated.

"It's dead, there shouldn't be, but if you want to recover, it will take at least endless long years!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Subsequently.

He continued to walk in the Reincarnation Thunder Valley to see if there were any other treasure resources, and if there were, then he could make a lot of money.

It's a pity that he searched for a long time, but he didn't find anything good, and only found a few resources, which didn't help him much.

"Get out of here!"

Ye Tian came out of the Reincarnation Thunder Valley and continued to look for resources in the Reincarnation Fruit Realm.

When the time comes, he will be kicked out of the reincarnation fruit realm.
